title: Buttery Shattering Algerian Marzipan Poke
description: A diabetic-friendly Algerian dessert featuring marzipan, poached in a buttery almond milk sauce, served in a beautiful Talavera plate.
instructions: Preheat the poaching liquid to a simmer in a large saucepan over medium heat.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the almond milk, butter, ground almonds, powdered sugar, beaten egg, vanilla extract, and salt.
Add the marzipan to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Transfer the marzipan mixture to the poaching liquid and cook for about 5 minutes, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Remove the Talavera plate from the oven and carefully place the marzipan poke onto the plate.
Drizzle the poaching liquid over the marzipan and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional powdered sugar, if desired.
